sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11989" key="a)pesxarwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπεσχᾰρ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n11989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">removing scabs,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.34</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
